display.purpose: Page titles only. Space Grotesk bold, 24px.

body.purpose: Paragraphs, descriptions, panel content. IBM Plex Sans 13px.

label.purpose: Navigation, section labels, category markers. IBM Plex Sans 600, 11px.

mono.purpose: File paths, symbol names, IDs, timestamps. IBM Plex Mono 12px.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default ease-out for entering elements, hover, focus.

motion.name: spring-lerp
motion.purpose: Camera interpolation, hover glow, selection ring.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Cyan background, OLED black text. Primary actions — indexing, confirming, selecting.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #59F6FF; color: #000000; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 4px; border: none; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #3AA8B0; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #59F6FF; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent background, muted text. Secondary actions — cancel, dismiss, browse.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #8B91A0; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 4px; border: none; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; cursor: pointer; transition: all 120ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #16171C; color: #E0E4EC; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #59F6FF; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: OLED black background, mono font. Search fields, command palette, data entry.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #000000; color: #E0E4EC; border: 1px solid #1E1F25; border-radius: 4px; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; outline: none; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 120ms ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #5A6070; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #59F6FF; outline: 2px solid #59F6FF; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Navigation Item
components.description: Sidebar nav row with icon, label, shortcut. Active: 2px cyan left bar.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; width: 100%; padding: 10px 12px; background: transparent; color: #8B91A0; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; transition: all 120ms ease-out; position: relative; text-align: left; border-radius: 4px; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #16171C; color: #E0E4EC; } .ds-nav-item.active { color: #59F6FF; background: rgba(89,246,255,0.1); } .ds-nav-item.active::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 2px; height: 20px; background: #59F6FF; border-radius: 0 2px 2px 0; } .ds-nav-item kbd { margin-left: auto; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; color: #5A6070; } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #59F6FF; outline-offset: -2px; }

components.name: Panel
components.description: Right-side panel for detailed views. 380px fixed, Surface background, 1px border.
components.html:
Impact Analysis
Panel content goes here.
components.css: .ds-panel { width: 380px; height: 100%; background: #0E0F12; border-left: 1px solid #1E1F25; overflow-y: auto; padding: 16px; scrollbar-width: thin; scrollbar-color: #1E1F25 transparent; } .ds-panel-header { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; color: #E0E4EC; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-panel-body { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #8B91A0; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-panel::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 5px; } .ds-panel::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; } .ds-panel::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #1E1F25; border-radius: 3px; }

components.name: Chip / Tag
components.description: Language badges, kind filters. Selected: 10% cyan tint.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; background: #0A0B0E; color: #8B91A0; border: 1px solid #1E1F25; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; transition: all 120ms ease-out; } .ds-chip:hover { background: #16171C; color: #E0E4EC; } .ds-chip.selected { background: rgba(89,246,255,0.1); color: #59F6FF; border-color: rgba(89,246,255,0.3); }

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Minimal floating label. Surface background, 1px border, no shadow.
components.css: .ds-tooltip { position: absolute; padding: 4px 8px; background: #0E0F12; color: #E0E4EC; border: 1px solid #1E1F25; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; white-space: nowrap; z-index: 60; pointer-events: none; animation: fadeIn 150ms ease-out; }

components.name: Skeleton Loader
components.description: Shimmer placeholder during loading. Respects prefers-reduced-motion.
components.css: .ds-skeleton { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #0E0F12 25%, #0A0B0E 50%, #0E0F12 75%); background-size: 200% 100%; animation: shimmer 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; border-radius: 4px; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-skeleton { animation: none; background: #0E0F12; } }

narrative.overview: You are looking out at a vast codebase through a precision instrument. The dark field is not decoration — it is the void against which structure becomes visible. Every bright point is a symbol, every line is a relationship, and the instrument's purpose is to make the invisible architecture of code appear with total clarity. The graph canvas is the primary surface. It breathes perpetually — nodes drift on gentle sine waves, edges follow their endpoints, and the particle constellation parallax responds to the cursor with spring-based momentum. The graph never feels dead. This is not decoration; it is the living pulse of a codebase being observed.
keyCharacteristics: Pure OLED black — no tinted neutrals, no warm-charcoal pretense
Tonal depth only — no shadows, no glass effects, no decorative blur
Precision geometry — clean borders, consistent spacing, mechanical feel
One accent color (electric cyan) reserved for active states and primary actions
Vivid node kind colors — each symbol kind emits its own spectral hue
Living canvas — perpetual ambient breathing, spring-based particle parallax
Dark by necessity, not by style — the graph needs maximum contrast to breathe

rules.name: The Reticle Rule
rules.body: Electric cyan (#59F6FF) is used on ≤10% of any given screen. It appears only on: the currently selected node, active sidebar item, focus rings, primary action buttons, and highlighted edges. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Tonal Depth Rule
rules.body: Depth is conveyed through surface color steps (OLED black → Surface → Surface Hover), never through shadows, drop-shadows, or backdrop-blur.

rules.name: The OLED Rule
rules.body: The background is pure #000000. No tinting, no warming, no gradient.

rules.name: The Single-Weight Rule
rules.body: Space Grotesk uses only weight 700 (bold). Differentiated by size alone.

rules.name: The Monospace-For-Data Rule
rules.body: Any text that represents code, paths, IDs, or technical data is set in IBM Plex Mono.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. No shadows, no backdrop-blur, no lift on hover.

rules.name: The Three-Step Rule
rules.body: Exactly three surface depths: background (OLED black), surface (#0E0F12), surface-hover (#16171C).

dos: Do use OLED black (#000000) as the primary background
Do use tonal layering for depth — OLED black → Surface (#0E0F12) → Surface Hover (#16171C)
Do reserve electric cyan (#59F6FF) for selection, focus, and active states only
Do use vivid spectral colors for node kinds — they must remain visible on pure black
Do use IBM Plex Mono for all code, paths, IDs, and technical data
Do keep body text at ≥4.5:1 contrast ratio against dark backgrounds
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion — disable ambient breathing, particle drift, all entrance animations
Do keep the graph alive — ambient breathing ensures nodes are never perfectly still
Do use edge lineWidth 1.2px minimum for default edges
donts: Don't use shadows, drop-shadows, or backdrop-blur anywhere
Don't use glassmorphism, glass effects, or decorative transparency
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient)
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px as accent)
Don't use oversized rounded corners (>12px). Max border-radius: 12px.
Don't use neon glow, RGB effects, or scanline overlays
Don't use identical card grids with icon + heading + text repeated endlessly
Don't use decorative motion — no bounce, no elastic, no orchestrated page-load sequences
Don't put display fonts (Space Grotesk) in UI labels, buttons, or data
Don't use Text Dim (#5A6070) for body text or any text that carries meaning
Don't use modal as first thought
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number, small label, supporting stats, gradient accent)
Don't use tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section
Don't use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as default scaffolding
Don't let the graph become perfectly still after force simulation settles
Don't use edge lineWidth below 1.0px — edges vanish on OLED black
